name: an explicitly required tool that is absent still hard-fails to red before any native fallback (28.28 preserved)
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > ok.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file ok.tf --tools checkov --required-tools checkov 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && ! grep -q 'fallback=native' e.txt && echo required-hard-fail-preserved 1>&2
